creator: guy.tabrar@me.com
text:
Hi,

Consider addressing these issues and uploading the port as a .shar file:
FATAL: Makefile: [18]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
WARN: Makefile: COMMENT is not supposed to begin with 'A ', 'An ', or 'The '.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: COMMENT should begin with a capital, and end without a period
WARN: /usr/ports/sysutils/log-courier/distinfo: [1]: TIMESTAMP is over 30 days old
WARN: /usr/ports/sysutils/log-courier/files/patch-docs__examples__example-json.conf: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.
1 fatal error and 5 warnings found.

Cheers,

Guy
